name: Calculatrice de Moquette
seo_title: Calculatrice Moquette – Mètres Carrés et Linéaires
seo_description: Calculez la quantité de moquette nécessaire en m², yards et mètres linéaires. Entrez les dimensions de la pièce et la largeur du rouleau.
description: Calculateur 1106. Free online calculator with formula, examples and step-by-step guide.
desc: Calculateur 1106. Free online calculator with formula, examples and step-by-step guide.
steps: Linear metres from roll: ceil(20 ÷ 3.66) × 3.66 = ~21.96 m
Add 10% for cuts and seams: ~24 linear metres
mistakes: Measuring the room and buying exactly that area — seams and cuts waste 10-15%
Forgetting to add extra for pattern matching (pattern repeat × number of drops)
Not accounting for door and bay window recesses
formula_display: Room area = Length × Width; Linear metres = ceil(area ÷ roll_width × adjustment_factor)
